changes: Rewrote the [data-theme='dark'] block in globals.css to match the 3 dark-mode screenshots (21-inicio-escuro, 22-perfil-escuro, 23-historico-escuro) and the reference app.css dark theme values. Key changes: (1) surfaces aligned to app.css reference (#0b1422 app, #15203a surface, #1a2742 surface-2, #1e2a47 sunken, #0e1830 ink-surface); (2) text colors adjusted (#ecf1f8 fg-1, #b6c2d6 fg-2, #94a2bc fg-3, #6e7e99 fg-4); (3) borders changed from solid hex to translucent white (rgba 0.08/0.14/0.22) for better adaptability on navy backgrounds; (4) added brand green overrides for dark (green-50 translucent, green-500 #1fb85b, green-600 #2dd46e, green-700 #5fe195) so bg-green-50 icon squares and green text are brighter on dark; (5) added yellow, ink, win/loss/warn/bal dark overrides with lifted hues and translucent backgrounds; (6) added gray-0/50/100/200/300/400 dark overrides so components using bg-gray-0 etc. get dark surfaces; (7) shadows restored to subtle non-none values (previous had shadow-sm:none which broke card elevation in dark); (8) shadow-cta uses green-tinted glow matching reference. No pages or shared components were modified. ThemeContext unchanged (already correct).
